name: cliproot
description: Provenance tracking for AI-assisted research and multi-agent workflows

level.title: Knowledge Automation Level
level.description: Knowledge automation level. Leave at 'curator' for Phase A — 'digest'/'wiki' activate in later versions.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. Sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for background flush/compile calls. If blank, cliproot looks for CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN (from `claude setup-token`), then $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.credentials.json, then ~/.claude/.credentials.json. On macOS run `claude setup-token` — Keychain-stored login credentials are not readable from hook subprocesses.
